title: useDocumentVisibility
description: Tracks the visibility state of the document (visible or hidden), useful for pausing tasks when tab is inactive.
summary: Detects when the document becomes visible or hidden.

`,(0,i.jsx)(n,{name:"use-document-visibility",code:`"use client";\r
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";\r
\r
export function useDocumentVisibility(): DocumentVisibilityState {\r
  const [documentVisibility, setDocumentVisibility] = useState<DocumentVisibilityState>("visible");\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const listener = () => setDocumentVisibility(document.visibilityState);\r
    document.addEventListener("visibilitychange", listener);\r
    return () => document.removeEventListener("visibilitychange", listener);\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  return documentVisibility;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-document-visibility.ts"})]})}function d(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,i.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,i.jsx)(u,{...t})}):u(t)}function w(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return g(D);})();
